---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Inkiverse
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## Description

Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like.

## Alternative Solutions

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Cases

Who would benefit from this feature? Describe the use case(s).

## Examples

If applicable, provide examples of similar features in other applications.

## Impact

How would this feature improve the Inkiverse experience?

- [ ] Helps readers discover content
- [ ] Improves reading experience
- [ ] Helps writers publish content
- [ ] Improves community features
- [ ] Improves accessibility
- [ ] Other: _________

## Additional Context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
